name: Salt/Pepper Shag Rug - Threshold™
description:
The Salt/Pepper Shag Rug from Threshold™ is sure to impress with its distressed detailing and comfortable feel underfoot. This neutral rug showcases a unique light-on-dark speckled pattern for eye-catching style, and the loomed construction adds texture. Plus, the polypropylene backing helps the rug stay in place on surfaces like tile and hardwood floors.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
